title: 51 pcs Grinch Party Tableware Set, Christmas Paper Party Tableware Set, Grinch Paper Cups Napkins Plates Tablecloth
features: 【Create a Festive Affirmation】: This Christmas tableware set brings vibrancy to your festive gatherings. Savour holiday feasts with family and friends around a table brimming with Christmas cheer.

【Christmas Set】: The set comprises 51 pieces of Christmas tableware, accommodating up to 10 guests. It includes 10 x 9-inch paper plates, 10 x 7-inch small paper plates, 10 x paper cups, 20 x napkins, and 1 x tablecloth.
【Premium Materials】: Crafted from safe, non-toxic materials, the plates, cups and napkins utilise eco-friendly, biodegradable paper, ensuring no environmental impact.

【Convenient Use】: These party tableware items are portable and effortlessly disposable after use. Say goodbye to the hassle of washing up after parties and birthday celebrations. Let us help you host your next event with ease.
【Versatile Use】: Perfect for themed parties, Christmas celebrations, Grinch-themed birthdays, carnivals, festive gatherings, family reunions, or any holiday occasion.
description: Add festive cheer to your celebrations with our 51-piece Christmas party tableware set! This complete tableware collection features a playful Grinch design, bringing seasonal joy and celebration right to your table. Whether for family gatherings, parties, or any festive occasion, this set effortlessly creates memorable dining experiences while eliminating the hassle of washing up. Share cosy meals with loved ones, surrounded by Christmas magic – this all-in-one festive party solution ensures you savour every joyful moment.
